change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Internet-First University Press collection

origination.corpname: Cornell University (Title of work: Memorial statements..)

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University (Title of work: Necrology of the faculty of Cornell University..)

did.abstract: DVDs and supplementary materials from Cornell University conferences, lectures, and presentations .

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: The Internet-First University Press was the outcome of a project, "Creating an Open Access Paradigm for Scholarly Publishing," led by J. Robert Cooke and Kenneth M. King and funded by the Atlantic Philanthropies. The project created online and DVD versions of interviews, lectures, and symposia.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: DVDs and supplementary materials from Cornell University conferences, lectures, and presentations.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Internet-First University Press Collection, #6746. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: "Cornell 1969" and "30th Anniversary of WSH Takeover" DVDs may not be reproduced.

did.unittitle: "Analytical Elements of Mechanics, Volume 1," by Thomas R. Kane
"Analytical Elements of Mechanics, Volume 2," by Thomas R. Kane

"Compendium of Scottish Silver, Volume 2," by Rodney R. Dietert and Janice M. Dietert
"Enrico Fermi: The Master Scientist," by Jay Orear and others
"Knowledge, Perception, and Memory," by Carl Ginet
"Highlights in Dairy Cattle Reproduction in the Last 100 Years," by Robert H. Foote
"New Concepts of Cattle Growth," by Roy T. Berg and Rex M. Butterfield
"McGraw-Hill Series in Mechanical Engineering," by Thomas R. Kane and David A. Levinson
"More Other Homes and Garbage: Designs for Self-Sufficient Living," by Jim Leckie, Gil Masters, Harry Whitehouse, and Lily Young
"Advocacy and Interventions: Readings in Communication and Development," by Royal D. Colle
Publication and University event materials on CD
"An Incremental Directory of Contents of the Internet-First University Press"
